items.title: Cloudflare Introduces Project Think: A Durable Runtime for AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Cloudflare Introduces Project Think: A Durable Runtime for AI Agents. Cloudflare's Project Think introduces a new framework for AI agents, shifting from stateless orchestration to a durable actor-based infrastructure.

items.title: Designing Memory for AI Agents: Inside Linkedin’s Cognitive Memory Agent
items.summaryShort: Designing Memory for AI Agents: Inside Linkedin’s Cognitive Memory Agent. LinkedIn introduces Cognitive Memory Agent (CMA), generative AI infrastructure layer enabling stateful, context-aware systems.

items.title: Pretext.js Bypasses DOM Layout Reflow, Enabling Advanced UX Patterns at 120 FPS
items.summaryShort: Pretext.js Bypasses DOM Layout Reflow, Enabling Advanced UX Patterns at 120 FPS. Cheng Lou, a Midjourney engineer, recently released Pretext, a 15KB open-source TypeScript library that measures and lays out text without browser layout reflo

items.title: Subagents in Gemini CLI Enable Task Delegation and Parallel Agent Workflows
items.summaryShort: Subagents in Gemini CLI Enable Task Delegation and Parallel Agent Workflows. Google has introduced subagents in Gemini CLI, a new capability designed to help developers delegate complex or repetitive tasks to specialized AI agents operating

items.title: Presentation: Event-Driven Patterns for Cloud-Native Banking - What Works, What Hurts?
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Event-Driven Patterns for Cloud-Native Banking - What Works, What Hurts?. Chris Tacey-Green discusses the shift from synchronous commands to asynchronous events within highly regulated environments.

items.title: Who is John Ternus, the incoming Apple CEO?

items.title: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return
items.summaryShort: Anthropic takes $5B from Amazon and pledges $100B in cloud spending in return. Amazon has made another circular AI deal: It's investing another $5 billion in Anthropic.

items.title: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries
items.summaryShort: Google rolls out Gemini in Chrome in 7 new countries. Google is rolling out Gemini in Chrome in Australia, Indonesia, Japan, the Philippines, Singapore, South Korea, and Vietnam.
